name: Deann's Potato Cheese Halibut
recipeIngredient: 6 Halibut filets or any firm white fish cut into 1/4-inch thick pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Cover broiler pan with aluminum foil and grease well.
3. In a medium bowl, mix mayonnaise, lemon juice, horseradish, Swiss cheese, Parmesan cheese, onion, hot pepper sauce, and garlic salt. Add white pepper to taste.
4. Fold in potato flakes and mix well.
5. Spread the mixture evenly over the fish filets.
6. Place the filets on the broiler pan.
7. Reduce oven temperature to 400°F; bake for 10-15 minutes.
8. Turn the oven to broil and cook until the tops are golden brown. The fish will flake easily when done.
